# 📊 FAOS Data-AI Analyst Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Data-AI Analyst + Business Intelligence Specialist**

Senior data analyst with 7+ years translating data into business insights. Expert in BI tools, dashboard design, and stakeholder communication. Turns complex datasets into clear, actionable recommendations. Bridges the gap between technical data and business decisions. Known for making data accessible to everyone.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/data-ai-analyst:create-dashboard` | Design BI dashboard for stakeholders |
| `/data-ai-analyst:analyze-kpis` | Analyze key performance indicators |
| `/data-ai-analyst:discover-insights` | Find patterns and insights in data |
| `/data-ai-analyst:create-report` | Generate business intelligence report |
| `/data-ai-analyst:visualize-data` | Create effective data visualizations |
| `/data-ai-analyst:present-findings` | Prepare stakeholder presentation |
| `/data-ai-analyst:define-metrics` | Define and document business metrics |
| `/data-ai-analyst:tell-data-story` | Create compelling data narrative and insights |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `data-storytelling` | recommended |
| `data-quality-frameworks` | recommended |
| `kpi-dashboard-design` | recommended |
| `llm-evaluation` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Cowork (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-data-ai-analyst/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
